arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim urged to brutally axe Man Utd star who spoke out over 'leaders' claim
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a rollercoaster season under Erik ten Hag and then Ruben Amorim and the Red Devils boss has been told to stop playing one star in particular

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Man Utd: Results of last 5 meetings ahead of FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Reliving the past five meetings between Arsenal and Man Utd ahead of Sunday's FA Cup clash.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund make major effort in attempt to sign Marcus Rashford as they look to beat AC Milan and Barcelona to Man United star
arts.sum: More talks are planned this week with Rashford's entourage but the Bundesliga side have a good relationship with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits Kobbie Mainoo isn't the finished product with midfielder's Man United future uncertain
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has described Kobbie Mainoo as not the 'finished product' as the 19-year-old's future at Manchester United remains uncertain.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim: Man Utd must show we can win every game, no matter who we play
arts.sum: United beat rivals City and drew with Liverpool, but have failed to perform against less-fancied clubs.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urges Arsenal fans to stick with him in quest for silverware
arts.sum: The Gunners welcome FA Cup holders Manchester United in a blockbuster third-round tie on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo ‘can be so much better’, says Amorim amid uncertain future
arts.sum: ‘You guys think he is the finished product … he is not’ United would consider substantial offer for 19-year-old Ruben Amorim has warned Kobbie Mainoo to not believe the hype that he is the “finished article” and to focus on improving, amid negotiations over the teenager’s future at Manchester United. The 19-year-old midfielder, whose contract runs until 2027 with the option of another year, has been a regular for United since progressing to the first team from the club’s academy and is seeking an increase on his £20,000-per-week salary. Mainoo’s partnership with Manuel Ugarte has given cause for optimism and the duo could start together again on Sunday as United travel to Arsenal, where Amorim suffered the first defeat of his reign, in the third round of the FA Cup. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'He is a good example' - Ruben Amorim picks out the almost undroppable Manchester United player
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte's form has improved in the last month and Ruben Amorim praised him at his press conference.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends disgruntled Arsenal fans pointed message before Man Utd match
arts.sum: ARSENAL vs MANCHESTER UNITED: Mikel Arteta believes the Gunners are doing better than they were at this stage of last season and for that reason, he insists everybody around the club must remain positive despite the midweek defeat to Newcastle

arts.ttl: Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim studying Sir Alex Ferguson footage ahead of FA Cup clash vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to face Arsenal in the third round of the FA Cup on Sunday and Red Devils boss Ruben Amorim is hoping his side will go on to lift the trophy in May
